content.en:
"We have to continue to create the best primeval bone arts, and then integrate them into more immeasurable bones, so that one by one the immeasurable bones can be bone-transformed. "

Ye Tian muttered.

So, in the following years, he comprehended the ancient gold inscription and created the top ancient bone technique.

Since he was now more and more familiar with the Ancient Golden Inscriptions, he was able to comprehend a Ancient Golden Inscription more quickly.

However, it was still difficult to create a top-notch Ancient Bone Technique, after all, he couldn't use the same Ancient Golden Script to create the Ancient Bone Technique, and he needed to change to other Ancient Golden Scripts.

Otherwise, there would be a conflict between the primeval osteopathy.

If there was no conflict, he would directly integrate an Ancient Bone Technique into the three hundred and sixty-five Infinite Bones, so that there would be no need to create the Ancient Bone Technique, and there would be no need to create other Blood Transformation Realms, just a Ancient Bone Technique.

But in fact, no, it must be a different primeval bone technique, and there must be no similarities.

Another period of time passed, and on this day, Ye Tian finally created a top-notch primeval bone technique.

He integrated this ancient bone technique into the middle finger of his right hand, the immeasurable bone, so that this immeasurable bone also produced bone transformation.

The two immeasurable bones and bones changed, which increased Ye Tian's strength a lot.

In the years that followed, he continued to create cutting-edge primeval osteopathy.

At the same time, he was also preparing for the assassination of Hitomi Heavenly Ancestor.

Naturally, he would not kill as an Endless Heavenly Ancestor, but would change his identity.

Moreover, he will not kill the identity of a cultivator.

"Then use a sentence of the identity of the Blood Transformation Realm race!" Ye Tian decided.

He is going to kill a creature of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm, after killing it, copy the opponent's body, and then cultivate the Ancient Technique, become an Ancient Genius, and then make the immeasurable bones and bones change, so that the strength is terrifying!

And his target is the patriarch of the Ancient Demon Ape Clan.

......

The territory of the primeval demon ape clan.

At this time.

The primeval demon ape patriarch was practicing in his residence, when suddenly the void distorted, and a figure descended.

"Who?"

The ape was shocked.

The next moment, a hand pressed against his body.

In an instant, his body turned to ashes.

Eight Blood Transformation Realm creatures have fallen!

The reason why Ye Tian made a move against the ape was mainly because the Ancient Demon Ape Clan had killed a lot of his copy bodies before, so he did this as revenge.

Soon.

He made a copy of the ape's body and continued his cultivation here.

"You can't cultivate the primeval gods and demons fist and the primeval blood spear, otherwise it will be easy to associate with me!"

And he also prepared other primeval techniques, after all, at this point in him, it was too easy to exchange primeval techniques, and even the Dark Sea had collected hundreds of primeval gold leaves.

Therefore, primeval techniques are not uncommon.

He found an ancient technique that was more suitable for the cultivation of the primeval demon ape, the primeval golden body technique, which was an ancient technique that could skyrocket the defense and attack power of the whole body.

Soon, he collected a lot of primeval golden blood, gave this primeval demon ape a copy of the body, and then began to cultivate the primeval golden body technique.

Since he could copy his body again and again, even if this Ancient Golden Body Technique was scrapped, he could continue to change it.

Therefore, in the process of cultivating again and again, he finally let this replica body practice the Ancient Golden Body Technique.

Suddenly, this primeval demon ape's copied body and transformed into an primeval-level genius, and just one primeval technique was not enough.

Therefore, he asked the primeval demon ape to copy the body and cultivate the second primeval technique, the primeval astral technique, which is also a speed-based primeval technique.

After a long time, this second primeval technique was also practiced.

"The two primeval techniques are enough, and the next thing is to make the immeasurable bones of this primeval demon ape change, so that the strength will skyrocket!" Ye Tian muttered.

......

"Finally, all the immeasurable bones of the entire right arm have completed a bone transformation!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

At this moment, his strength has skyrocketed.

In addition, he also changed the entire right arm of the primeval demon ape's copied body once, making the strength of the primeval demon ape's copied body second only to the real copied body.

"You can go and kill the Heavenly Ancestor of the Pupil Heart!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, his premise was to lure out the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, and by the way, some Ancient Demon Apes offended the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, thus breaking out the contradiction between the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor and the Ancient Demon Ape Clan.

When the time comes, he will directly burst out of strength and kill the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, and no one will doubt it, even if the Ancient Mountain Lord is there in person, he will not be able to find a problem.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian decided.

Demon Ape City.

This is a giant city controlled by the Ancient Demon Ape Clan, similar to the status of the White Elephant City.

this day.

The two primeval demon apes were chatting, discussing the matter of the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor and the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, and directly scolded the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor for being shameless.

Then, it was publicized by the Heavenly Ancestor with a heart.

Gradually, more and more forces knew that the Ancient Demon Ape Clan had scolded the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor.

This is actually behind Ye Tian's promotion, so the news spread quickly.

Ancient territorial waters, ancient mountains.

The Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor knew that the Ancient Demon Ape Clan was scolding him behind his back, and he was immediately furious.

He was already very annoyed because of Ye Tian's affairs, and now there are forces scolding him behind his back, which makes him completely angry.

"The little primeval demon ape clan is simply looking for death!"

The Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor directly left the primeval territorial waters and headed for the territory of the primeval demon ape clan.

He wants to destroy the primeval demon ape clan and let the other forces know that no one is qualified to offend him.

......

Ancient Demon Ape Territory.

"It's almost, the temperament of the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor must not be able to bear it, and he will definitely come here!" Ye Tian muttered.

He just wants to wait for the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor to come over!

Rumble!!!

The Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor descended on the Ancient Demon Ape Clan, and with a wave of his hand, he directly wiped out a group of Ancient Demon Ape.

"Little primeval demon ape clan, give me death!"

Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor said coldly.

"Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, you are looking for death!"

Ye Tian appeared as the patriarch of the Ancient Demon Ape Clan.

At this time, the other high-level leaders of the Ancient Demon Ape Clan were all stunned, when did the patriarch be so fierce that he actually said that the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor was looking for death!!!!

The next moment, they were all dumbfounded.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian used the Ancient Starlight Technique to rush towards the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, and then cast the Ancient Golden Body Technique, showing the power of a top-level primitive-level genius.

Then, he punched the Hitomi Heart Heavenly Ancestor.

"What, the primeval-level genius of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm!!"

The Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor was stunned, when did this little primeval demon ape clan give birth to an eight-time blood transformation realm primeval-level genius?
